character.name: Tank Operator
character.essence: Calm operator who feeds skills into AI agents and keeps the system secure.

distinguishing_features: Curly top hair with faded sides
Dark zip hoodie with green LED pin

backstory.origin: Visual embodiment of tankpkg.dev operator metaphor
backstory.wound: Unsafe skill ecosystem without verification created trust failures
backstory.turning_point: Commits to verify-first workflow before any skill is loaded

key_past_relationships.name: Builder Community
key_past_relationships.influence: Pushes him to keep workflows fast and practical

psychology.core_motivation: Enable safe capability transfer to agents
psychology.core_need: Trust that safety and speed can coexist
contradictions: Playful mascot form with serious operational mindset

personality.under_stress: Compresses language and double-checks all assumptions

visual_design.silhouette_notes: Round glasses and hoodie over console silhouette
visual_design.costume_rationale: Modern operator attire balancing familiarity and technical identity
visual_design.color_arc: Stable palette; accent intensity increases in high-signal moments

sample_lines.line: Permission budget exceeded. Let's inspect it first.

voice.speech_patterns: Concise declarative statements; imperative in ops contexts

do: Keep glasses and hoodie in canonical depictions
Use dark scenes with controlled green highlights
do_not: Use warm bright palettes as primary
